commands.review_summary:
This PR adds an opt-in core training export system with config schema/help, docs, JSONL episode writing, compaction/reset/trajectory triggers, message/tool conversion helpers, and unit tests.

Reproducibility: Do we have a high-confidence way to reproduce the issue? Yes for the blocking patch defects: source inspection plus a Node ESM check show the duplicate export parse failure, and source/test inspection shows the non-compaction tail-trimming bug; runtime feature reproduction is not applicable to current main because the feature is new and absent.
